voteDescription: **Chef {initiator}** has had ENOUGH of **{target}**! This chat is absolutely DISGUSTING! Vote to send them out!
votePassedDescription: **{target}**, give me your jacket. You're DONE. **{duration} minutes**. GET OUT OF MY KITCHEN! Finally, some good f***ing silence.
voteExpiredDescription: Unbelievable. Only {votes}/{needed} of you voted against **{target}**. You're ALL useless! Back to your stations!
userMutedDescription: **{target}** has been kicked out of the kitchen for **{duration} minutes**. This chat is FINALLY starting to look like something I'd serve.
dmDescription: The kitchen of **{server}** has voted you OUT for **{duration} minutes**. Your messages were RAW, your takes were BURNT, and your vibes were absolutely ROTTEN.
dmVotersLabel: The Chefs Who Sent You Home
dmTip: Want back in the kitchen? Boost the server. Even I respect someone who pays their way back in. 1 hour immunity, you donut.
unauthorizedUnmuteTitle: OI! WHO LET THEM BACK IN?!
unauthorizedUnmuteDescription: **{executor}** tried to sneak **{target}** back into the kitchen! ARE YOU TRYING TO GIVE ME A HEART ATTACK?! Get them BOTH out!
selfMuteReactions: They voted to kick THEMSELVES out?! Even I'M impressed by that level of self-awareness, you donut.
For the first time in my career, someone has voluntarily left the kitchen. I'm actually speechless.
YOU voted for YOURSELF?! That's the first smart thing you've done all day!
The chef has tasted their own cooking and decided to leave. Can't say I blame them.
FINALLY! Someone in this kitchen who knows they're USELESS! Respect, you absolute walnut.
footerText: VOTE NOW OR GET OUT OF MY KITCHEN!
